particulars.description: Freehold property known as 12 kenton close, bracknell, berkshire, RG12 9AZ, being all of the land and buildings in title BK92667. Freehold property known as 31 the oaks, bracknell, RG12 2XG, being all of the land and buildings in title BK63498, for further details of properties charged, please refer to the instrument, including all buildings, fixtures and fittings, the related rights and the goodwill.
